## Review Checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped to the linked task.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated for behavior changes.
- [ ] Secrets, API keys, and local-only files are not committed.
- [ ] User-facing behavior or workflow changes are documented.
- [ ] CI passes before merge.
